title: Who would win Adam or Lilith
display_title: Who would win Adam or Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by VUX » Thu Jan 18, 2018 6:24 pm Who is stronger?

[]: Re: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by StrokeMeGoat » Thu Jan 18, 2018 11:26 pm As far as we can tell, both Adam and Lilith are essentially identical, physically speaking. They were just provided different fruits to provide their children. Kaworu's reaction to encountering Lilith in Terminal Dogma, if taken at face value (no speculation about pretending to be surprised or putting on a show), would seem to help corroborate this.

[]: Re: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Jan 19, 2018 11:58 am In every single canon, Lilith and her progenitors have been the victors over Adam, but if they were to go up against each other one on one, it's hard to tell. If Adam's true form is the Giant of Light, which is basically an Awakened Evangelion, and Lilith's true form is the giant Rei seen in EoE, I'm pretty sure it's obvious who would win.

[]: Re: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by StrokeMeGoat » Fri Jan 19, 2018 2:52 pm AdamMalkobitch wrote: In every single canon, Lilith and her progenitors have been the victors over Adam

[]: Re: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 26, 2018 10:29 pm At one point, I started writing a crappy fanfic where the two engage in a Spear-assisted duel. Lilith does not have an S2, and so is seen to quickly burn away her excess flesh and become a creepy skeletal being. Adam's obvious advantage, however, is balanced out by the fact that Adam is stuck using an Eva-style meatsack body. In other words, if you stab Adam, there is a wound and she bleeds; it only seals up once deliberately healed. If you stab Lilith, the wound seals up instantaneously when the penetrating object is removed. Lilith's pliable form also means that mere CONTACT with her is a body hazard, and Adam loses a couple of limbs this way. Lilith, in other words, sustains herself during the duel by eating Adam . I also decided that explosive blasts wouldn't work on Lilith; instead of destroying her, they just SCATTER her. Easier to avoid the all-devouring white ooze when it's in compact form. This being a Reichu fanfic, however, there was no way Lilith would win in the end. After much hardship, Lilith is killed in simultaneously gruesome and sexy manner. Of course, this fanfic was so shitty that I gave up on it before it ever got to the demented and kind of cool ending. (Also I had two consecutive HDD failures that ate my work and thoroughly demoralized me.) Oh well. AdamMalkobitch wrote: If Adam's true form is the Giant of Light

[]: Re: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by VUX » Fri Jan 26, 2018 11:33 pm What if all 7 seeds of life assimilated with one another?

[]: Re: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 27, 2018 12:10 am That would be a major waste of seven worlds' worth of potential life. (I appreciate the questions, but an endless stream of them over multiple threads with little to no further thoughts added isn't conducive to meaty, mutualistic conversation. Please make your posts a bit more substantial.)

[]: Re: Who would win, Adam or Lilith             Quote Post by ShonHam » Tue Aug 21, 2018 9:16 am Due to the lack of evidence suggesting otherwise, I'd need to go with Lilith as the winner. They're similar to an uncanny extent, therefore it's safe to say they'd be around the same level, anyways.
